title: Assistance for Small Businesses
summary: This Treasury Department page provides a high-level overview of COVID-19 small business assistance programs including the Employee Retention Credit, Paid Leave Credit, Emergency Capital Investment Program, and Paycheck Protection Program. The content is descriptive and lacks specific numbers, dates, or policy updates.
key_points: Describes the Employee Retention Credit and Paid Leave Credit extended by the American Rescue Plan
References the Emergency Capital Investment Program supporting low- and moderate-income community financial institutions
Mentions the Paycheck Protection Program for maintaining payroll and overhead
why_it_matters: This page does not provide actionable market information. It is a static informational page describing federal small business assistance programs without specific dollar amounts, program dates, eligibility criteria, or any data relevant to market structure or macro trading catalysts.
